intent: Build a simple Python task management library (tasklib). It is not a production system. Its purpose is to validate that the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline can close a complete dependency chain — from documentation through scaffold to working code — with real merges at each step.
scope_statement:
Build a minimal Python task management library (tasklib) as defined in TRD-TASKLIB, consisting of a documentation set (README, ARCHITECTURE, API reference), a Python package scaffold under src/tasklib/ with models/ and storage/ subpackages, a Task dataclass with TaskStatus enumeration (FR-1 through FR-7), an InMemoryTaskStore (FR-8 through FR-14), a CLI entry point (FR-15 through FR-19), and a package root re-exporting the public API (FR-20). The library validates the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline's ability to close a complete dependency chain — docs → scaffold → model → storage → CLI — with real merges at each step.

simpler monotonically increasing integer be preferred for readability during pipeline validation

prd_plan.title: Documentation Set: README, ARCHITECTURE, and API Reference for tasklib
Package Scaffold and pyproject.toml: src/tasklib/ Directory Tree with Empty Init Files
Task Model: TaskStatus Enumeration and Task Dataclass (FR-1 through FR-7)
InMemoryTaskStore: Task Collection Management (FR-8 through FR-14)
CLI Entry Point: add, list, and complete Commands (FR-15 through FR-19)
Package Root Public API Re-export and End-to-End Integration Tests (FR-20)

1.title: Add tasklib documentation set — README, ARCHITECTURE, and API reference
1.summary: Creates docs/tasklib/ directory with three markdown files: README.md (library purpose, zero-external-dependency constraint, package structure tree, usage example), ARCHITECTURE.md (four-layer dependency chain docs→scaffold→model→storage→CLI, no-circular-dependency invariant, layer rationale), and API.md (Task dataclass fields with types/defaults including monotonically increasing integer id, TaskStatus enum members, all InMemoryTaskStore method signatures/return types/error behaviors, CLI commands with arguments/output, package-root re-export contract). These documents establish the authoritative specification for all subsequent tasklib code PRs.
